# StayOnSite

> Personalboende och företagsbostäder i hela Sverige. Vi hjälper byggbolag och industriföretag att hitta möblerade boenden för sina team.

Last updated: 2026-02-07

## What we do

StayOnSite provides furnished worker accommodation for construction companies and industrial teams across Sweden. We handle everything from finding apartments to contracts, furnishing, cleaning, and ongoing support. One contact person throughout the project.

## Contact

- Phone: +46 76-249 84 86
- Email: info@stayonsite.se
- Website: https://stayonsite.se
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/46762498486

## Services

- Furnished apartments for construction crews and industrial teams (30+ days)
- All-inclusive pricing (utilities, internet, cleaning, linens)
- Professional invoicing for corporate accounting
- Housing plan delivered within 24 hours
- Dedicated account manager for each project
- Parking for service vehicles where available

## Industry expertise

StayOnSite specializes in housing for these sectors:
- Nuclear energy (Oskarshamn, Boden, Säffle)
- Wind power and renewable energy projects
- Data center construction (Luleå, Boden)
- Road and railway infrastructure (Trafikverket projects)
- Mining and mineral extraction (Norrbotten)
- Industrial construction and assembly
- Bridge and tunnel projects
- Solar park installations

## Track record

- 100+ satisfied corporate clients since 2013
- 500+ accommodations arranged across Sweden
- Average response time: under 3 hours
- 40+ cities covered
- 4.8/5 average customer rating
- 10+ years of experience in corporate housing

## Why companies choose StayOnSite

- One dedicated contact person per project
- Housing plan delivered within 24 hours
- All-inclusive pricing: rent, utilities, internet, cleaning, linens
- Professional corporate invoicing
- Flexible contract lengths (30+ days)
- No hidden fees or broker commissions
- We speak Swedish, English, and Polish

## Coverage

19 cities across Sweden:
Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö, Uppsala, Västerås, Örebro, Linköping, Norrköping, Helsingborg, Jönköping, Gävle, Luleå, Umeå, Boden, Oskarshamn, Motala, Västervik, Vingåker, Säffle.

We also arrange housing in locations outside these cities on request.

## Target customers

- Construction companies with workers on temporary assignments
- Industrial and energy companies (nuclear, mining, data centers)
- Infrastructure projects (roads, railways, tunnels)
- Installation and assembly teams (montörer)

## For property owners

StayOnSite also rents apartments from private homeowners at a fixed monthly rate.
- Guaranteed fixed rent every month with no deductions
- Professional corporate tenants only (no private tenants)
- StayOnSite handles all tenant management, contracts, and maintenance
- Property returned in original condition
- No fees or commissions deducted from the homeowner's rent
- Learn more: https://stayonsite.se/for-husagare

## Frequently asked questions

Q: How quickly can StayOnSite arrange accommodation?
A: We deliver a housing plan within 24 hours and can often arrange move-in within days.

Q: What is included in the price?
A: All-inclusive: rent, utilities, internet, cleaning, bed linens, and a dedicated contact person.

Q: What areas does StayOnSite cover?
A: 19 cities across Sweden, plus custom locations on request.

Q: What types of companies use StayOnSite?
A: Construction, energy (nuclear, wind, solar), infrastructure, mining, and industrial assembly companies.

Q: Does StayOnSite offer short-term stays?
A: Minimum 30 days. We specialize in project-based accommodation from 1 month to several years.

## Languages

Swedish (primary), English, Polish

## Key pages

- Homepage (SV): https://stayonsite.se
- Corporate Housing (EN): https://stayonsite.se/en/corporate-housing-sweden
- Zakwaterowanie Firmowe (PL): https://stayonsite.se/pl/zakwaterowanie-firmowe
- For Homeowners (SV): https://stayonsite.se/for-husagare
- About Us: https://stayonsite.se/om-oss
- City pages follow the pattern: https://stayonsite.se/stad/{city-slug}
  Example: https://stayonsite.se/stad/stockholm

## Pricing model

- Companies pay StayOnSite a fixed all-inclusive monthly rate per accommodation
- No hidden fees, no broker commissions to the client
- Pricing varies by city, apartment size, and contract length
